name: 12" Wavy Wall Shelf 2pk Black - Room Essentials™
description:
Bring elegant charm to your space with these 2-Pack Wavy Wall Shelves from Room Essentials™. This pack includes two decorative wall shelves that feature wavy sides for a distinct look. You can install them on a wall to display your portraits, paintings and other decor. Plus, they are designed in a black hue to match any existing decor theme.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
